Author: Market Assistant Dev
Name: Market Master Pro
Punchline: Manual market intelligence and arbitrage scanner for FFXIV.
Description: Analyzes market opportunities with Universalis data, watchlists, velocity filters, and manual undercut helpers. All actions are manual. Now includes real-time undercut notifications.
Changelog:
v1.1.34: Scanner now persists the most recent opportunities and keeps them visible until a new scan completes; latest opportunity snapshot is restored on startup.
v1.1.33: Stability pass: opportunities table now supports row caps, compact mode, and optional detailed tooltips; exclusion inspector now uses TTL caching with refresh debounce; added pluginmaster feed validation script for safer releases.
v1.1.32: Added Capital Allocator, Queue Simulator (best/base/worst + expected value + liquidity delay), and Why-Not-Included Inspector for watchlist exclusions.
v1.1.31: Added scan profiles, explainable opportunity scoring, position sizing, risk regime detection, route planning, watchlist auto-discovery, recommendation feedback loop, strict repricing guardrails, degraded-mode action blocking, safe bulk queueing, and updated opportunities tooltips.
